title: DarkHorseStocks
subtitle: Digital Marketing Project Manager | Jul 2024 – Jul 2025

paragraphs: Led digital marketing strategy for an international fintech/startup focused on data-driven small and micro-cap investment analytics. Managed multi-channel campaigns across social, email, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp for a global investor audience.
bullets: Managed digital campaigns across multiple platforms to 15k+ Telegram, 7.6k Instagram, 5.2k Twitter
Analysed marketing campaign performance generating consumer trend insights and sales optimization recommendations
Built email marketing automation system using AWS SES and CI/CD infrastructure
Scaled LinkedIn subscriber base to 46,000+ and leveraged 35,000+ WhatsApp API network for marketing distribution
Built automated reporting dashboards using Excel and analytics tools

summary: DarkHorseStocks experience page (Jul 2024–Jul 2025) highlighting social media growth metrics: 46k+ LinkedIn, 35k+ WhatsApp, 15k+ Telegram, 7.6k Instagram, 5.2k Twitter, plus AWS SES email automation infrastructure.
